movies.title: The Bride!
movies.description: The internet is completely divided — a furious, feminist reimagining that has everyone talking.
movies.overview: A lonely Frankenstein travels to 1930s Chicago to ask groundbreaking scientist Dr. Euphronious to create a companion for him. The two revive a murdered young woman and The Bride is born. But what ensues is beyond what either of them imagined.

movies.title: "Wuthering Heights"
movies.description: Affair rumors, historic inaccuracies, and Saltburn-levels of depravity — see what the fuss is about.
movies.overview: Tragedy strikes when Heathcliff falls in love with Catherine Earnshaw, a woman from a wealthy family in 18th-century England.

movies.title: Scream 7
movies.description: Neve Campbell's explosive return is breaking the internet — nostalgia mixed with brutal new rules.
movies.overview: When a new Ghostface killer emerges in the quiet town where Sidney Prescott has built a new life, her darkest fears are realized as her daughter becomes the next target. Determined to protect her family, Sidney must face the horrors of her past to put an end to the bloodshed once and for all.

movies.title: Avatar: Fire and Ash
movies.description: The ultimate cinematic spectacle — Twitter can't agree on the plot, but visuals are epic.
movies.overview: In the wake of the devastating war against the RDA and the loss of their eldest son, Jake Sully and Neytiri face a new threat on Pandora: the Ash People, a violent and power-hungry Na'vi tribe led by the ruthless Varang. Jake's family must fight for their survival and the future of Pandora in a conflict that pushes them to their emotional and physical limits.

movies.title: Crime 101
movies.description: Chris Hemsworth in a slick, Michael Mann-style heist — the perfect new dad movie.
movies.overview: When an elusive thief whose high-stakes heists unfold along the iconic 101 freeway in Los Angeles eyes the score of a lifetime, with hopes of this being his final job, his path collides with a disillusioned insurance broker who is facing her own crossroads. Determined to crack the case, a relentless detective closes in on the operation, raising the stakes even higher.

movies.title: Pretty Lethal
movies.description: Gen Z ballerinas taking out bad guys in tutus — TikTok's new aesthetic obsession.
movies.overview: A troupe of ballerinas find themselves fighting for survival as they attempt to escape from a remote inn after their bus breaks down on the way to a dance competition.

movies.title: Send Help
movies.description: Sam Raimi is back! A shockingly gory, hilarious survival thriller the internet loves.
movies.overview: Two colleagues become stranded on a deserted island, the only survivors of a plane crash. On the island, they must overcome past grievances and work together to survive, but ultimately, it's a battle of wills and wits to make it out alive.

movies.title: How to Make a Killing
movies.description: Glen Powell brings his absolute A-game to this dark and hilarious recent thriller.
movies.overview: Disowned at birth by his obscenely wealthy family, blue-collar Becket Redfellow will stop at nothing to reclaim his inheritance, no matter how many relatives stand in his way.

movies.title: Sirāt
movies.description: A tense, beautifully shot Spanish thriller that is slowly gaining serious word-of-mouth buzz.
movies.overview: A man and his son arrive at a rave lost in the mountains of Morocco. They are looking for Marina, their daughter and sister, who disappeared months ago at another rave. Driven by fate, they decide to follow a group of ravers in search of one last party, in hopes Marina will be there.

movies.title: Agent Zeta
movies.description: Mario Casas delivers pure adrenaline in this freshly released, high-stakes international action flick.
movies.overview: Four Spanish ex-intelligence officers are assassinated simultaneously worldwide. The CNI discovers all participated in the covert "Operation Ciénaga" decades ago in Colombia. Zeta, the CNI's best operative, must hunt and protect the sole survivor, facing his deadliest global mission yet. Top Colombian agent Alfa will join Zeta, seemingly knowing more about "Ciénaga"'s secrets than him.

movies.title: The Testament of Ann Lee
movies.description: Amanda Seyfried anchors this gorgeous, haunting historical drama that just dropped on streaming.
movies.overview: The extraordinary true legend of Ann Lee, founder of the devotional sect known as the Shakers, who preached gender and social equality and was revered by her followers as the female Christ.

movies.title: Good Luck, Have Fun, Don't Die
movies.description: Sam Rockwell in a wildly entertaining sci-fi action-comedy from director Gore Verbinski.
movies.overview: A 'Man from the Future' arrives at an LA diner where he must recruit the precise combination of disgruntled patrons to join him on a one-night quest to save the world from the terminal threat of a rogue artificial intelligence.

movies.title: Solo Mio
movies.description: Kevin James brings the laughs in this brand-new, lighthearted romantic comedy.
movies.overview: After Matt's dreams of a picturesque Italian wedding are shattered when his fiancée leaves him at the altar, he embarks on his planned honeymoon across Italy alone, immersing himself in the country's vibrant culture, food, and beauty, meeting Gia along the way.

movies.title: War Machine
movies.description: Alan Ritchson fighting mechs in the woods — purely awesome, turn-your-brain-off sci-fi action.
movies.overview: On one last grueling mission during Army Ranger training, a combat engineer must lead his unit in a fight against a giant otherworldly killing machine.

movies.title: Cold Storage
movies.description: Joe Keery stars in this bizarre, funny, and frighteningly fresh sci-fi horror ride.
movies.overview: When a mutating, highly contagious fungus escapes a sealed facility, two employees – joined by a grizzled bioterror operative – must survive the wildest night shift ever to save humanity from extinction.

movies.title: Whistle
movies.description: Dafne Keen leads this creepy, atmospheric new horror film that will keep you guessing.
movies.overview: A misfit group of unwitting high school students stumble upon a cursed object, an ancient Aztec Death Whistle. They discover that blowing the whistle and the terrifying sound it emits will summon their future deaths to hunt them down.

movies.title: Shelter
movies.description: Jason Statham does what he does best in this gritty, brand-new action thriller.
movies.overview: A man living in self-imposed exile on a remote island rescues a young girl from a violent storm, setting off a chain of events that forces him out of seclusion to protect her from enemies tied to his past.

movies.title: Marty Supreme
movies.description: Timothée Chalamet shines in this critically acclaimed A24 thriller that demands your attention.
movies.overview: Marty Mauser, a young man with a dream no one respects, goes to hell and back in pursuit of greatness.

movies.title: Arco
movies.description: Breathtaking animation and a deeply imaginative sci-fi world make this a hidden gem.
movies.overview: 10-year-old Arco lives in a far future. During his first flight in his rainbow suit, he loses control and falls into the past. Iris, a girl his age from 2075, comes to his rescue and tries by all means to help send him back to his era.

movies.title: The Voice of Hind Rajab
movies.description: Devastating and necessary. Critics are calling it one of the year's most powerful films.
movies.overview: January 29, 2024. Red Crescent volunteers receive an emergency call. A five-year old girl is trapped in a car under fire in Gaza, pleading for rescue. While trying to keep her on the line, they do everything they can to get an ambulance to her. Her name was Hind Rajab.

movies.title: Firebreak
movies.description: A pulse-pounding Spanish thriller that grabs you in the first minute and never lets go.
movies.overview: Little Lide disappears in the forest while her family packs up their home. As a fire breaks out, her mother must race to reach her before the flames do.

movies.title: No Other Choice
movies.description: A masterful, twisty Korean thriller from Park Chan-wook that critics are universally praising.
movies.overview: After being laid off and humiliated by a ruthless job market, a veteran paper mill manager descends into violence in a desperate bid to reclaim his dignity.

movies.title: 28 Years Later: The Bone Temple
movies.description: Nia DaCosta breathes terrifying new life into this legendary, intense zombie franchise.
movies.overview: Dr. Kelson finds himself in a shocking new relationship - with consequences that could change the world as they know it - and Spike's encounter with Jimmy Crystal becomes a nightmare he can't escape.

movies.title: Mercy
movies.description: Chris Pratt leads a relentless, action-packed sci-fi battle that just hit digital.
movies.overview: In the near future, a detective stands on trial accused of murdering his wife. He has ninety minutes to prove his innocence to the advanced AI Judge he once championed, before it determines his fate.

movies.title: Love Me Love Me
movies.description: A freshly released, intensely emotional romantic drama guaranteed to tug at your heartstrings.
movies.overview: After her brother's death, June moves to Milan for a fresh start, finding comfort in Will, the perfect honor student at her new international school. But when his troubled best friend James—hiding a dangerous life in clandestine MMA fights—sparks a rivalry that quickly turns into irresistible attraction, June must choose between safety and a love that upends everything she thought she wanted.

movies.title: Is This Thing On?
movies.description: Bradley Cooper and Laura Dern shine in this sharply written, fresh dramatic comedy.
movies.overview: As their marriage quietly unravels, Alex faces middle age and an impending divorce, seeking new purpose in the New York comedy scene while Tess confronts the sacrifices she made for their family—forcing them to navigate co-parenting, identity, and whether love can take a new form.

movies.title: Primate
movies.description: A tense, fast-paced horror flick that will genuinely make you jump out of your seat.
movies.overview: Lucy, a college student, along with her friends, spend their vacation at her family's home in Hawaii, which includes her pet chimpanzee, Ben. However, when Ben contracts rabies after being bitten by a rabid animal, the group must fight for their lives in order to avoid the now-violent chimp.

movies.title: Hamnet
movies.description: Paul Mescal and Jessie Buckley are devastatingly good in this Oscar-worthy historical drama.
movies.overview: The powerful story of love and loss that inspired the creation of Shakespeare's timeless masterpiece, Hamlet.

movies.title: The Secret Agent
movies.description: Wagner Moura is electrifying in this slick, highly acclaimed Brazilian crime thriller.
movies.overview: Brazil, 1977. Marcelo, a technology expert in his early 40s, is on the run. Hoping to reunite with his son, he travels to Recife during Carnival but soon realizes that the city is not the safe haven he was expecting.
production_companies: Banco Regional de Desenvolvimento do Extremo Sul

movies.title: The Housemaid
movies.description: Sydney Sweeney stars in this incredibly twisted, dark psychological thriller everyone is whispering about.
movies.overview: Trying to escape her past, Millie Calloway accepts a job as a live-in housemaid for the wealthy Nina and Andrew Winchester. But what begins as a dream job quickly unravels into something far more dangerous—a sexy, seductive game of secrets, scandal, and power.

movies.title: We Bury the Dead
movies.description: Daisy Ridley brings incredible depth to this moody, apocalyptic horror-thriller.
movies.overview: After a catastrophic military disaster, the dead don't just rise - they hunt. Ava searches for her missing husband, but what she finds is far more terrifying.

movies.title: Dhurandhar
movies.description: An epic, sprawling Indian action-thriller with jaw-dropping set pieces and massive scale.
movies.overview: A mysterious traveler slips into the heart of Karachi's underbelly and rises through its ranks with lethal precision, only to tear the notorious ISI-Underworld nexus apart from within.

movies.title: The Wrecking Crew
movies.description: Dave Bautista and Jason Momoa team up for explosive, hilarious buddy-cop action.
movies.overview: Estranged half-brothers Jonny and James reunite after their father's mysterious death. As they search for the truth, buried secrets reveal a conspiracy threatening to tear their family apart.

movies.title: David
movies.description: A beautifully animated, inspiring family film with a fantastic voice cast and big heart.
movies.overview: From the songs of his mother’s heart to the whispers of a faithful God, David’s story begins in quiet devotion. When the giant Goliath rises to terrorize a nation, a young shepherd armed with only a sling, a few stones, and unshakable faith steps forward. Pursued by power and driven by purpose, his journey tests the limits of loyalty, love, and courage—culminating in a battle not just for a crown, but for the soul of a kingdom.

movies.title: Silent Night, Deadly Night
movies.description: A brutal, unforgiving slasher reboot perfect for a late-night horror marathon.
movies.overview: After witnessing his parents' brutal murder on Christmas Eve, Billy transforms into a Killer Santa, delivering a yearly spree of calculated, chilling violence. This year, his blood-soaked mission collides with love, as a young woman challenges him to confront his darkness.

movies.title: Greenland 2: Migration
movies.description: Gerard Butler returns for more intense, apocalyptic survival action.
movies.overview: Having found the safety of the Greenland bunker after the comet Clarke decimated the Earth, the Garrity family must now risk everything to embark on a perilous journey across the wasteland of Europe to find a new home.

movies.title: Anaconda
movies.description: Jack Black and Paul Rudd deliver hilarious, campy fun in this creature-feature reboot.
movies.overview: A group of friends facing mid-life crises head to the rainforest with the intention of remaking their favorite movie from their youth, only to find themselves in a fight for their lives against natural disasters, giant snakes and violent criminals.

movies.title: Ella McCay
movies.description: Emma Mackey and Jamie Lee Curtis charm in this delightful, easy-to-watch comedy.
movies.overview: An idealistic young politician juggles familial issues and a challenging work life while preparing to take over the job of her mentor, the state’s longtime incumbent governor.

movies.title: Zootopia 2
movies.description: Disney magic strikes again — a stunningly animated adventure the whole family will love.
movies.overview: After cracking the biggest case in Zootopia's history, rookie cops Judy Hopps and Nick Wilde find themselves on the twisting trail of a great mystery when Gary De'Snake arrives and turns the animal metropolis upside down. To crack the case, Judy and Nick must go undercover to unexpected new parts of town, where their growing partnership is tested like never before.

movies.title: The Big Fake
movies.description: An engaging, twist-filled Italian crime drama that will keep you guessing until the end.
movies.overview: Toni Chichiarelli arrives in Rome with the dream of becoming a painter, but his talent leads him elsewhere — from art galleries to state secrets. Between art, crime, and power, his signature ends up everywhere — even in the history of Italy.

movies.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Search for SquarePants
movies.description: Pure, chaotic nostalgia — underwater animated silliness that hits exactly the right spot.
movies.overview: Desperate to be a big guy, SpongeBob sets out to prove his bravery to Mr. Krabs by following The Flying Dutchman – a mysterious swashbuckling ghost pirate – on a seafaring adventure that takes him to the deepest depths of the deep sea, where no Sponge has gone before.

movies.title: The Rip
movies.description: Matt Damon and Ben Affleck reunite for a gritty, high-octane crime thriller.
movies.overview: Trust frays when a team of Miami cops discovers millions in cash inside a run-down stash house, calling everyone — and everything — into question.

movies.title: Rental Family
movies.description: Brendan Fraser delivers a deeply touching, funny performance in this heartwarming indie drama.
movies.overview: An American actor in Tokyo struggles to find purpose until he lands an unusual gig: working for a Japanese 'rental family' agency, playing stand-in roles for strangers. As he immerses himself in his clients' worlds, he begins to form genuine bonds that blur the lines between performance and reality.

movies.title: Song Sung Blue
movies.description: Hugh Jackman and Kate Hudson dazzle in this touching, music-filled romantic drama.
movies.overview: Based on a true story, two down-on-their-luck musicians form a joyous Neil Diamond tribute band, proving it's never too late to find love and follow your dreams.

movies.title: Dust Bunny
movies.description: Mads Mikkelsen is terrifyingly good in this dark, twisted fantasy-horror ride.
movies.overview: Ten-year-old Aurora asks her hitman neighbor to kill the monster under her bed that she claims ate her family. To protect her, he must battle an onslaught of assassins while accepting that some monsters are real.

movies.title: People We Meet on Vacation
movies.description: A charming, breezy romantic comedy perfect for a cozy movie night in.
movies.overview: Poppy's a free spirit. Alex loves a plan. After years of summer vacations, these polar-opposite pals wonder if they could be a perfect romantic match.

movies.title: Predator: Badlands
movies.description: Elle Fanning faces the ultimate hunter in this beautifully shot, intense sci-fi survival flick.
movies.overview: Cast out from his clan, a young Predator finds an unlikely ally in a damaged android and embarks on a treacherous journey in search of the ultimate adversary.

movies.title: The Tank
movies.description: A gripping, tense war drama that feels incredibly immersive and harrowing.
movies.overview: A German Tiger tank crew is sent on a dangerous mission to rescue the missing officer Paul von Hardenburg from a top-secret bunker behind enemy lines. As they make their way through the lethal no-man's land, they must confront not only the enemy, but also their own fears and inner demons. Fueled by the Wehrmacht's methamphetamine, their mission increasingly becomes a journey into the heart of darkness.

movies.title: Wicked: For Good
movies.description: The spectacular, gravity-defying musical conclusion that you absolutely have to see to believe.
movies.overview: As an angry mob rises against the Wicked Witch, Glinda and Elphaba will need to come together one final time. With their singular friendship now the fulcrum of their futures, they will need to truly see each other, with honesty and empathy, if they are to change themselves, and all of Oz, for good.

movies.title: Goodbye June
movies.description: Kate Winslet gives a powerhouse, tear-jerking performance in this heavy emotional drama.
movies.overview: Four siblings' lives change drastically when their ailing mother takes a turn for the worse over the holiday season.

movies.title: Sentimental Value
movies.description: Renate Reinsve is flawless in this complex, critically adored Scandinavian family drama.
movies.overview: Sisters Nora and Agnes reunite with their estranged father, the charismatic Gustav, a once-renowned director who offers stage actress Nora a role in what he hopes will be his comeback film. When Nora turns it down, she soon discovers he has given her part to an eager young Hollywood star.

movies.title: Nuremberg
movies.description: Russell Crowe and Rami Malek anchor this gripping, historically vital courtroom drama.
movies.overview: In postwar Germany, an American psychiatrist must determine whether Nazi prisoners are fit to go on trial for war crimes, and finds himself in a complex battle of intellect and ethics with Hermann Göring, Hitler's right-hand man.

movies.title: Eternity
movies.description: Elizabeth Olsen shines in this sweet, time-bending romantic comedy.
movies.overview: In an afterlife where souls have one week to decide where to spend eternity, Joan is faced with the impossible choice between the man she spent her life with and her first love, who died young and has waited decades for her to arrive.

movies.title: Springsteen: Deliver Me from Nowhere
movies.description: Jeremy Allen White completely transforms into The Boss in this stunning musical biopic.
movies.overview: Bruce Springsteen, a young musician on the cusp of global superstardom, struggles to reconcile the pressures of success with the ghosts of his past.

movies.title: The Great Flood
movies.description: A massive, visually spectacular Korean disaster epic that demands the biggest screen possible.
movies.overview: When a raging flood traps a researcher and her young son, a call to a crucial mission puts their escape — and the future of humanity — on the line.

movies.title: It Was Just an Accident
movies.description: A masterfully crafted Iranian mystery-thriller that is as tense as it is intelligent.
movies.overview: An unassuming mechanic is reminded of his time in an Iranian prison when he encounters a man he suspects to be his sadistic jailhouse captor.

movies.title: Sisu: Road to Revenge
movies.description: Pure, unadulterated, bloody revenge action — brutal, efficient, and incredibly satisfying.
movies.overview: Returning to the house where his family was brutally murdered during the war, "the man who refuses to die" dismantles it, loads it on a truck, and is determined to rebuild it somewhere safe in their honor. When the commander who killed his family comes back hellbent on finishing the job, a relentless, eye-popping cross-country chase ensues.

movies.title: Now You See Me: Now You Don't
movies.description: Jesse Eisenberg returns for more slick, fast-paced heist magic and illusions.
movies.overview: The original Four Horsemen reunite with a new generation of illusionists to take on powerful diamond heiress Veronika Vanderberg, who leads a criminal empire built on money laundering and trafficking. The new and old magicians must overcome their differences to work together on their most ambitious heist yet.

movies.title: The Mastermind
movies.description: Josh O'Connor leads this methodical, sharply directed indie crime drama.
movies.overview: In a sedate Massachusetts suburb circa 1970, unemployed family man and amateur art thief J.B. Mooney sets out on his first heist. With the museum cased and accomplices recruited, he has an airtight plan. Or so he thinks.

movies.title: Tell Me Softly
movies.description: A slow-burn, beautifully romantic Spanish drama that lingers long after the credits.
movies.overview: Kamila has everything under control: studies, social life, her image... Everything except the unexpected return of her neighbors, the Di Bianco brothers, after seven years of absence. Thiago stole her first kiss, and Taylor was her best friend, but now their return will turn Kami's world upside down. Can the three overcome the past that binds them? Or will everything explode into pieces once again?
